title: Citrus Crumble Veggie Goatskewer
description: An adventurous Ethiopian dish featuring goat meat marinated with a blend of citrusy flavors and served on a crumbly vegan-friendly crust, along with pickles for an added tang.

ingredients.name: goat meat
ingredients.notes: ensure it is cooked to a safe internal temperature of at least 62°C (144°F) for food safety

instructions: Marinate goat meat with lemon, lime, and orange juices, along with salt and paprika. Allow to marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add enough coconut oil to coat the bottom of the pan.
Sauté the minced garlic in the hot skillet until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the minced clove of garlic and cook for an additional 15 seconds, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat and fold in all-purpose flour. Mix well to combine.
Stir in cayenne pepper if using, then gradually add the marinade while continuously mixing until a smooth crumbly consistency is achieved.
Thread the marinated goat skewers onto metal or wooden skewers (alternatively use vegan alternatives for non-meat skewers).
Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). Arrange the veggie skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and evenly distribute the crumbly citrus crust mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy. Serve hot with pickles as desired.
Note: Safe internal temperature of meat is key to food safety.
